register.title: Create account
register.name: Name
register.privacyNote: Your data (name and email) is used only to manage your account: it is never shared with third parties and you can request its deletion at any time.
register.privacyAccept: I accept the processing of my data to manage my account.

forgot.title: Recover password
forgot.intro: Tell us your email and we will send you a reset link.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.done: Password reset: you can log in now.
reset.error: Could not reset (has the link expired?).

profile.justVerified: Your email has been verified. Thanks!
profile.unverified: Your email {email} is not verified yet. Check your inbox or request the link again.
profile.resendOk: We have sent you a verification email.
profile.name: Name

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.intro: Every print-ready PDF, no sign-up needed: cards, tokens and game documents.

collection.title: Your collection
collection.intro: Add cards from the listings and generate your custom PDF; no sign-up needed (the collection lives in this browser and expires on its own).
collection.empty: Your collection is empty: add cards from the listings.

consent.text: This site uses no cookies. It only stores functional preferences (language, theme), your session and, if you use it, your PDF collection in your browser. No tracking, no third parties. If you decline, everything still works but nothing is remembered after a reload.
